zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond於1100年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德丹乃時，他的父親Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond35歲，母親Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp36歲。他於1139年與Bertha Duchess of Brittany在法國波特芝士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1146年9月15日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫代利享年46歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼貝加德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond于1100年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德丹乃时，他的父亲Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond35岁，母亲Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp36岁。他于1139年与Bertha Duchess of Brittany在法国波特芝士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1146年9月15日在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫代利享年46岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼貝加德。

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brittany
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: modern coinage, taken from the traditionally Celtic-speaking region of north-west France, known in medieval Latin as Britannia, because it was settled by refugees from Cornwall and Devon following the establishment of the Anglo-Saxon kingdom of Wessex. Its adoption as a given name has also been influenced by Britt , of which it is sometimes regarded as the full form. In recent years it has rapidly established itself as a popular name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond was born in 1100, in Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, was 35 and his mother, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, was 36. He married Bertha Duchess of Brittany in 1139, in Poitou, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 September 1146, in Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Bégard, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond est né en 1100, à Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Bertha Duchess of Brittany en 1139, à Poitou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1146, à Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Bégard, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond 1100 in Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond 35 und seine Mutter Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp 36. Er hat 1139 in Poitou, Frankreich Bertha Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1146 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Bégard, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond è nato il nel 1100 nel Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Bertha Duchess of Brittany nel 1139, nel Poitou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1146, nel Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Bégard, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmondが1100年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードデナインで生まれた時，父Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmondは35歳，母Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingampは36歳であった。1139年にフランスポイトウでBertha Duchess of Brittanyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1146年9月15日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモードeリーンで46歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンブeガードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond(이)가 1100년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 데나인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1139년 프랑스 포이토우에서 Bertha Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1146년 9월 15일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 드e리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 브e가드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond nasceu em 1100, em Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha Duchess of Brittany em 1139, em Poitou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1146, em Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Bégard, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond родился в 1100 г. в местности денеин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha Duchess of Brittany в 1139 г. в местности поитоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1146 г. в местности дeриен, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности бeгард, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond nació en 1100, en Denain, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Bertha Duchess of Brittany en 1139, en Poitou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1146, en Dérien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Bégard, Bretagne, Francia.
